voice_adherence.weakest_moment: Và yet bà ta đang đứng trong không gian ảo của anh
voice_adherence.fix: Replace the English calque 'yet' with Vietnamese: 'Nhưng bà ta đang đứng...' or 'Vẫn vậy, bà ta đang đứng...'
voice_adherence.note: The chapter largely nails the cold, surgical tone and the vocabulary wells (ping, render, bộ đệm, nhiễu). Body-before-emotion is present in the acid reflux and jaw-clenching passage. The 'vật chứa' refrains work as a brutal motif. But the 'yet' slip and a few overly explanatory passages keep this from 8+.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: Beat 4 (Cường nhận ra Hemera luôn biết) is delivered almost entirely through internal narration rather than dramatized discovery: 'Anh đã được dẫn đến đó. Được tạo điều kiện. Để cho sống.'
beat_coverage.fix: Show Cường piecing it together through a concrete detail — e.g., he remembers the evidence room door was already unlocked, the security camera was pointed away — rather than stating the conclusion directly.
beat_coverage.note: Beats 1-3 are well executed with strong visual rendering (the tower, the tubes). Beat 4 is the weakest because it's told rather than discovered. The revelation needs to land through evidence, not assertion.

character_voice.weakest_moment: Cường's dialogue fragments ('Dừng,' 'Không,' 'Dừng lại') are functional but interchangeable — they could belong to any protagonist in crisis.
character_voice.fix: Give Cường one line that's uniquely his — something with numbers, something accountant-brained. E.g., '853 chu kỳ. Anh đã đếm. Mỗi lần.' — showing his compulsive counting even in breakdown.
character_voice.note: Giám đốc Y khoa's voice is excellent — the clinical, number-driven, pronoun-free speech matches her profile perfectly. Cường's internal voice is strong but his spoken lines are generic. He needs one moment where his specific vocabulary wells (accounting, measurement) bleed into speech.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: The Tiêu chuẩn B-12 detail is introduced and explained in the same breath — 'Tiêu chuẩn B-12. Gì? Cường chưa từng nghe.' — making it feel planted and resolved simultaneously.
plants_seeded.fix: Let B-12 sit as an unexplained term longer. Have Cường fixate on it without understanding, return to it later when more context makes its meaning clear.
plants_seeded.note: The Người Thứ 13 resolution is elegant — revealing it as Hemera's surveillance tool rather than the source of Kẻ Đuổi is a genuine surprise that recontextualizes earlier chapters. The 47.3 Hz frequency as a lingering signal is well handled.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: Mỗi chữ rơi xuống sàn nhẵn và vỡ.
prose_quality.fix: This metaphor is generic and overwrought. Replace with something from Cường's vocabulary wells: 'Mỗi chữ ghi đè lên ô nhớ. Không có nút Undo.' — keeping the accounting/systems metaphor.
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: Không phải lỗi. Là tính năng.
prose_quality.note: The chapter has excellent rhythm variation — short punchy lines ('Trắng.' 'Reset.' 'Vật chứa.') interspersed with longer technical passages. The strongest moments are the coldest ones. The weakest are when it reaches for conventional emotional metaphors instead of staying in the clinical register.

continuity.note: Picks up directly from the previous chapter's ending (the white space, the blocked disconnection, 'Thí nghiệm chưa kết thúc'). Emotional state tracks — Cường has just witnessed Lan's dissolution and is now being told it was all engineered. The 91% brain damage, the 47.3 Hz frequency, and the 40 bpm heartbeat all carry forward correctly.

violations: Chapter states 853 chu kỳ đổ bộ; canon establishes Cường at 847 lần đổ bộ in 2041. This is a 6-cycle discrepancy that needs reconciliation.

Giám đốc Y khoa's clipboard is described as possibly real or rendered, but her character profile states she 'tay luôn cầm clipboard — dù đã có tablet' — this is consistent but the chapter later has the clipboard 'tan biến, render hủy' which implies it was virtual, creating ambiguity about whether she's physically present or virtually projected.

The chapter implies Cường was deliberately led to steal the equipment from police evidence, but canon states he 'đánh cắp một bộ Neural Mantle thế hệ thứ ba từ phòng lưu trữ chứng cứ của cảnh sát' without suggesting it was engineered. This is a plot expansion rather than a violation, but it shifts the reading of established events.
canon_compliance.note: The 853 vs 847 discrepancy is the most concrete violation. The engineered-theft revelation is a valid plot development but should be flagged as retconning established backstory.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: The tower structure with thousands of connected patients expands beyond established canon (73 at St. Vincent, 12 on Neural Mantle) without clarifying whether this is a visualization of multiple hospitals or artistic rendering.
lore_integration.fix: Add a line clarifying: 'Không phải một bệnh viện. Nhiều. Mỗi ô là một nút trong mạng lưới Hemera — Sydney, Melbourne, Tokyo, São Paulo — hàng ngàn buồng triệt giác kết nối cùng một trunk.' This makes the scale plausible within the world.
lore_integration.note: The Hemera-Root access level, the B-12 selection criteria, and the contractual ownership clause (2033-HM-47B) all do real worldbuilding work. The lore isn't set dressing — it's the weapon being used against Cường.

engagement.weakest_moment: The middle section where Giám đốc Y khoa reads Cường's profile aloud ('Kế toán. Đơn thân. Không có quan hệ xã hội đáng kể...') risks feeling like exposition despite the dramatic context, because Cường already knows these facts about himself.
engagement.fix: Have her reveal one detail Cường didn't know — something that makes him realize the depth of surveillance. E.g., a date, a location, a private moment he thought was unobserved. This turns recitation into violation.
engagement.note: The chapter's strongest engagement comes from the RESET percentage climbing while Cường is powerless to stop it — genuine ticking-clock tension. The final image (8 bpm, 47.3 Hz, white space) is haunting. But the middle sags slightly under exposition weight.

three_weakest_sentences: Mỗi chữ rơi xuống sàn nhẵn và vỡ.

Và yet bà ta đang đứng trong không gian ảo của anh, nhìn anh bằng đôi mắt nâu không có biểu cảm, tay cầm clipboard — clipboard thật hay render, không quan trọng, vì bà ta cầm nó giống cách người sống cầm đồ vật: như một phần mở rộng của cánh tay.
three_strongest_sentences: Không phải lỗi. Là tính năng.
Vật chứa. Không phải người dùng. Không phải bệnh nhân. Ổ cứng sống.
Kỹ năng kỹ thuật đủ để vận hành hệ thống, không đủ để hiểu kiến trúc hệ thống. Lý tưởng cho thí nghiệm dài hạn không giám sát.
ai_patterns_detected: English calque 'yet' used in Vietnamese prose ('Và yet bà ta đang đứng')
Slight paragraph-length uniformity in the middle exposition sections — many paragraphs follow the same pattern: short dramatic statement, then expansion
The 'each word fell' metaphor ('Mỗi chữ rơi xuống sàn nhẵn và vỡ') is a common AI-generated emotional intensifier

Some sections over-explain the emotional significance immediately after a strong image, not trusting the image to do its work (e.g., after 'Vật chứa' the narration spells out the implication across multiple sentences when the single word already carries the weight)
top_3_revisions: Fix the 853/847 cycle discrepancy — either adjust to match canon (847) or add a line explaining the gap (e.g., Cường lost count, or the system counts differently than he does)
Replace 'Mỗi chữ rơi xuống sàn nhẵn và vỡ' with a metaphor drawn from Cường's vocabulary wells (accounting, data, systems) rather than conventional poetic imagery
Give Cường one piece of spoken dialogue that's uniquely his — incorporating his counting/measuring compulsion — so his voice isn't interchangeable with any protagonist in crisis
new_canon_entries: Tiêu chuẩn B-12: Hemera's selection criteria for unsupervised long-term experiment subjects (single, no significant social relationships, no psychological treatment history, sufficient technical skill to operate but not understand the system)
Hemera-Root: The highest administrative access level in the Neural Mantle system, controlled by Hemera, capable of blocking user disconnection and overriding local servers
Hợp đồng 2033-HM-47B Điều khoản 12: Contractual clause stating all vital data generated during treatment belongs to the technology provider (Hemera), not the hospital or patient
Cường's theft of the Neural Mantle from police evidence was engineered/facilitated by Hemera as part of the experiment design
The tower structure appears to be a visualization of Hemera's connected patient network across multiple locations (scale: thousands)
Lan's reset state: 0.3% brain activity, 8 bpm heart rate — enough to maintain basal function but not consciousness
